problem.title: Push and Pop in Stack
problem.description:
Problem: Implement push and pop operations on a stack and verify stack operations.

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n integers to push
- Third line: integer m (number of pops)

Output:
- Print remaining stack elements from top to bottom

Example:
Input:
5
10 20 30 40 50
2

Output:
30 20 10

solution.explanation: Read n numbers into an array, pop m times by moving the top index, then print remaining elements from top to bottom.
